_comment: Interactive-tier — consistent 20-30s/step under concurrent load. Auto-join fair-comparison parallel batches. See docs/MODELS.md for latency measurements.
name: gpt-4o

_comment: GPT-5 family — reasoning_effort=minimal is mandatory for interactive-tier latency; omitting it makes responses 3-5x slower and can produce empty content if max_tokens is tight. Threaded through VLMClient via ModelConfig.extra_params.
name: gpt-5.2

_comment: Anthropic — native protocol auto-selected when base_url contains 'anthropic'. Without that substring, the client falls back to OpenAI-compat (useful for gateway routing).
name: claude-sonnet-4-6

_comment: Env-var lookup — resolved at load time. Useful for CI.
name: gemini-3-pro

_comment: Key rotation — client advances on 429 / 503 / 529. Useful with free-tier quotas.
name: qwen-vl-max

_comment: Computational-tier — too slow (>60s/step) for interactive benchmarks but fine for per-round computational tasks like surface_billiards (5 rounds). Set parallel=false so it does not join default parallel batches; include explicitly via --models <name> when needed.
name: claude-opus-4-5
